experiencesHeader.subtitle: Behind the scene, Beyond the screen
experiencesHeader.title: Experiences

workExperiences.title: Full-Stack Developer
workExperiences.description: Embedded with a backend team to own frontend-facing infrastructure and cross-team API contract management. I design CI/CD pipelines, maintain developer tooling, and integrate AI-assisted workflows to accelerate complex feature delivery across distributed, async teams.

highlights.title: CI/CD Automation
highlights.description: (GitHub Actions, automated spec validation, linting, and testing pipelines)

highlights.title: Type Generation Pipeline
highlights.description: (OpenAPI → TypeScript types, npm package publishing, zero manual duplication)

highlights.title: AI-Assisted Development
highlights.description: (Claude Code, CLAUDE.md engineering configs, multi-session planning workflows)

highlights.title: API Contract Management
highlights.description: (OpenAPI/Scramble, cross-team integration, consistent frontend-backend contracts)

highlights.title: Developer Tooling
highlights.description: (Component scaffolding automation, type generation, test data setup via AI agents)

highlights.title: Cloud Infrastructure
highlights.description: (Image optimization pipelines, cloud storage workflows, asset load time reduction)

highlights.title: Backend Collaboration
highlights.description: (Laravel, production debugging, feature delivery, system stability improvements)

highlights.title: Distributed Team Workflow
highlights.description: (Async collaboration with US-based frontend team, cross-timezone API integration)

workExperiences.title: Frontend Developer
workExperiences.description: Core contributor to ShopScape — a multi-tenant e-commerce platform serving brands like Yuedpao, SE-ED, and 365BeautyClub. I engineered complex CMS systems, bulk data pipelines, and real-time streaming UIs across Super Admin, Seller, and Buyer applications.

highlights.title: CMS & Drag-and-Drop Engine
highlights.description: (Draft/Commit workflows, React Context DnD, 60fps debounced reorder callbacks)

highlights.title: Rich Text Editing
highlights.description: (Lexical editor integration, complex serialization for blogs and voucher systems)

highlights.title: Bulk Data Processing
highlights.description: (ExcelJS XLSX import/export, per-row error mapping, client-side pagination)

highlights.title: Real-Time Streaming UI
highlights.description: (ReadableStream ERP sync, live progress display, two-phase cancellation handling)

highlights.title: State Management
highlights.description: (MobX for complex deal models, SWR optimistic UI, real-time data sync patterns)

highlights.title: Performance Optimization
highlights.description: (Debounced search, requestIdleCallback, feature flags for incremental rollouts)

highlights.title: Analytics Dashboard
highlights.description: (Recharts with custom date pickers, previous period comparison, SWR-keyed caching)

highlights.title: Component Architecture
highlights.description: (Polymorphic coupon UI, crop image workflows, reusable form helpers with dirty state guards)

highlights.title: SEO & Structured Data
highlights.description: (JSON-LD injection for products and blogs, SSR-ready metadata compliance)

highlights.title: CDP & Analytics Tracking
highlights.description: (Cookie-gated CDP integration, configurable customer tracking, data-driven insights)

highlights.title: Category & Slug Management
highlights.description: (3-level hierarchy system, SWR data fetching, Yup strict schema validation)

highlights.title: Buyer Experience
highlights.description: (Embla Carousel, high-conversion storefront UI, responsive e-commerce browsing)

workExperiences.title: Frontend Developer
workExperiences.description: First professional role building responsive enterprise web UIs within an ASP.NET MVC environment. Focused on cross-browser compatibility, REST API integration, and page performance across production systems used by enterprise clients.

highlights.title: Enterprise UI Development
highlights.description: (HTML5, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery, production ASP.NET MVC applications)

highlights.title: Cross-Browser Compatibility
highlights.description: (Responsive layouts, consistent rendering across modern and legacy browsers)

highlights.title: REST API Integration
highlights.description: (AJAX-driven dynamic updates, backend contract collaboration, no full-page reloads)

highlights.title: Page Performance
highlights.description: (Asset optimization, deferred loading, DOM query improvements for enterprise modules)

highlights.title: Interactive UI Features
highlights.description: (Dynamic components, event-driven interactions, jQuery-based UI enhancements)

highlights.title: Backend Coordination
highlights.description: (API contract definition with backend team, iterative integration and testing)
